error_signature: form not submitting due to hidden required element
title: Form submission failure due to hidden required field
symptom: The form does not submit when the submit button is clicked, and required parameters are missing. This results in the form crashing.
applies_when: One or more required fields are hidden
not_this_if: Form submission works without hidden fields
root_cause: Hiding a required field in a form violates the submission rules, causing the form to fail. The form validation checks for visibility and requirement status, leading to a crash if a required field is not visible.
fix_steps: Identify the required fields in the form
Ensure that no required fields are hidden
Alternatively, set the 'required' option to false for hidden fields
agent_instruction: Ensure all required fields are visible in the form before submission.
